task: Move the kadai and place it at the right edge of the table.
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A stainless steel kadai (pan) is on a wooden table. A white mushroom and a blue-handled utensil are also on the table. The kadai is a rigid container with a handle; the table is a flat surface. STRATEGY - Reach the kadai, grasp its handle for a secure grip, lift it, transport it to the right edge of the table, and place it there. Failure modes include dropping the kadai during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach the kadai body to position the gripper. Step 2: Grasp the handle for a stable hold. Step 3: Transport the kadai to the right edge. Step 4: Place the kadai on the table edge.**
Goal: on(kadai, table); at_right_edge(kadai)
Scene: kadai, table, mushroom, utensil
Step 1: reach(kadai)
  affordance_region: the body of the stainless steel kadai
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, kadai, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, kadai) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(kadai)
  affordance_region: the handle of the stainless steel kadai
  contact: holding(kadai) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(kadai)
Step 3: transport(kadai -> table_right_edge)
  affordance_region: the right edge of the table
  spatial: above(kadai, table_right_edge, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(kadai)
  done_when: above(kadai, table_right_edge, 0.05)
Step 4: place(kadai -> table_right_edge)
  affordance_region: the right edge of the table
  contact: surface_contact(kadai, table_right_edge) [completion]; released(kadai) [completion]
  pose: stable(kadai) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(kadai, table_right_edge) AND released(kadai)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the stainless steel kadai
the handle of the stainless steel kadai
the right edge of the table
the right edge of the table
